title: Adventure Time!
body:
## About
This is the perfect modpack if you like to explore and hate to have to have a base that holds you from exploring far from it, because that is no more with this modpack!

### features
**Infinite amount of inventory space**

This modpack is the perfect modpack for someone who loves exploring. It gives you an infinite amount of inventory space, so You can explore for hours without worrying about running out of inventory space.

**New biomes**

The world is filled with new biomes, each with it's own look and atmosphere.

**New structures**

As you explore, you’ll also come across new structures scattered throughout your world.

**More immersive**

You'll feel more immersed with your world being able to see your own player, better combat and ambient sounds.

**Better performance**

The modpack also includes performance mods that help with better performance, even with all the added content.

## Important
Your extra inventory doesn't drop upon death. Take that in consideration when choosing between setting keep inventory on or off.
